rule.name: Actix Debug/Dev Exposure
rule.rule_desc: Detects potential debug logging exposure points requiring review.
rule.vuln_desc: Verbose logs in production can leak sensitive runtime details.
rule.developer: Use production-safe log levels and scrub sensitive data.
rule.reviewer: Review logger initialization and production env defaults.

rule.name: Actix Insecure TLS Handling
rule.rule_desc: Detects TLS certificate/hostname validation bypass in Rust HTTP clients.
rule.vuln_desc: TLS bypass allows interception and spoofing attacks.
rule.developer: Remove bypass options and enforce strict validation.

rule.name: Actix SQL Injection Sink
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely formatted SQL query construction.
rule.vuln_desc: String-built SQL can be vulnerable to injection.
rule.developer: Use parameterized query APIs and query builders.
rule.reviewer: Review data flow into formatted SQL fragments.

rule.name: Actix Permissive CORS
rule.vuln_desc: Wildcard origins can expose endpoints to untrusted origins.
rule.reviewer: Validate CORS middleware settings in server bootstrap.

rule.name: Actix Hardcoded Secret Material
rule.developer: Externalize secrets via environment or secure stores.
rule.reviewer: Verify no production credentials in code/config.
